title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Digital Marketing Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Holdings Services in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Holdings Services:
Ecom Express Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Holdings Services!
